•        Conventional 580 representative FICO requires DU approval and minimum 2 borrowers with DU average FICO ≥ 620

•        We have few jumbo products that have minimum loan amount of >$1 over conforming limit so when pricing your HB loans, you should get pricing for these jumbo products: J-CLASS-W and TWO-X EASY LITE
•        We have .5% pricing special for HB loans for borrowers that are not self-employed. You will see that as separate LLPA of .5. Our HB pricing with this special is very competitive
•        We now offer 90 days lock options
•        We offer customize loan terms for FHA,  conventional DU / LP products
•        We offer HELOC  ( 680 Fico with line limit up to $499,999) - only as combo with new FAM 1st mortgage
•        Our min Fico score for FHA and VA loans is 600 ( purchase only with AUS approval)
•        We offer rate lock 24/7 ( agency and government loans can be locked around the clock. Jumbo /Flex until 8:50 pm each business day )
•        We offer jumbo products that follow FNMA guidelines regarding income and assets/reserves ( 1 yr. tax returns available with AUS findings)
•        Our TT is competitive, and we can close loans in less than 30 days
